refined_caption: The hospital bathroom is dirty with toilet paper scattered all over the floor. The overall condition appears unhygienic.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was filthy with toilet paper all over the floor. As a patient, I'm concerned about the hygiene and cleanliness of the facility. This is unacceptable and needs to be addressed immediately.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, there's toilet paper all over the floor. It's really unhygienic and needs to be cleaned.
